---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change for discussion before implementation
title: "[Proposal]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Before you submit

Please use this template to discuss a proposed change **before opening a pull request**.

[PROJECT_NAME] follows a **maintainer-led roadmap**. We welcome proposals, but not every proposal will be accepted. Opening an issue first helps confirm whether a contribution is in scope.

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you are proposing.

## Why this should be in Handle

Explain why this belongs in the project and how it fits the current direction.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered, including external tools or userland solutions?

## Scope and impact

Please describe:
- who this helps
- whether this changes existing behavior
- whether this affects public APIs, architecture, or dependencies

## Are you planning to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, if maintainers agree it is in scope
- [ ] No, opening for discussion only

## Additional context

Add any mockups, examples, prior art, or related issues here.
